items.title: Amazon, Google And Others Are Pouring $700 Billion Into AI CapEx, Top Analyst Explains Why This Makes It 'Hard' To Bet Against Nvidia
items.description: As Amazon, Microsoft, Meta, Tesla, Apple and Google ramp up nearly $700 billion in AI-driven capital expenditures, Futurum CEO Daniel Newman argues that Nvidia could capture 40% to 50% of that spending, positioning it as the biggest immediate beneficiary of Big Tech's AI buildout ahead of its upcoming earnings report.

items.title: Tracking William Von Mueffling's Cantillon Capital Management Portfolio - Q4 2025 Update
Microsoft Is A Buy Amid Software Meltdown (Rating Upgrade)
items.description: Microsoft upgraded to Strong Buy: valuation dip plus 17% Q2 revenue growth and 39% Azure surge. CAPEX rise justified; Q3 outlook strong.

items.title: Maye Musk Says She's A 'Proud Mom' As Elon Musk Tops List Of 'America's Greatest Innovators,' Beats Jeff Bezos And Jensen Huang
items.description: Maye Musk said "Proud Mom" after Forbes ranked Elon Musk No. 1 on its 2026 list of America's greatest living innovators, ahead of Jeff Bezos, Bill Gates and Jensen Huang, as the $684 billion billionaire continues advancing SpaceX's lunar ambitions amid competition from Blue Origin.

items.title: Main Street Research Dumps 15,000 MercadoLibre Shares for $37 Million
items.description: MercadoLibre operates a leading e-commerce and digital payments platform across Latin America, serving millions of consumers and businesses.
